data.title: Bitget Wallet will support Ethereum EIP-7702 proposal to promote wallet intelligence
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Web3 wallet Bitget Wallet announced that it will support the key proposal EIP-7702 in Ethereum's latest system upgrade Pectra, taking the lead in making traditional wallets intelligent. With this upgrade, users can complete multiple transactions at once, pay handling fees with USDT or USDC, and even have a third party pay for Gas without changing their wallets, making the use of Web3 closer to the convenient experience of daily apps.
EIP-7702 not only improves wallet functions, but also brings new security challenges. To ensure user safety, Bitget Wallet has launched an exclusive detection mechanism to help users identify whether the wallet has enabled this function, and provides a one-click unbinding tool to prevent it from being exploited by malicious contracts. Bitget Wallet will continue to optimize functional experience and risk protection to bring a simpler, safer and more efficient Web3 entrance to the public.

data.title: A whale deposited 9.47 million USDT to Bybit 5 hours ago and bought 4,415 ETH
data.description: The Data Nerd monitoring shows that 5 hours ago, whale 0xbA7 deposited 9.47 million USDT to Bybit to buy 4,415 ETH. Now, he has fully bought 7,130 ETH (about 15.81 million US dollars), with an average entry price of about 1,900 US dollars.

data.title: dYdX: Remind users to migrate to ethDYDX as soon as possible, cross-chain bridge support may be terminated
data.description: dYdX officially announced that there are still more than 88.3 million ethDYDX that have not been migrated to the native DYDX on the dYdX chain. Previously, Nethermind proposed to terminate the cross-chain bridge support of dYdX in about 23 days, and the unmigrated tokens may not be converted at that time.

data.title: Crypto news today: Bitcoin pushes past $102K as record ETF flows, trade news fuel rally
data.description:
Bitcoin surged over 3% in 24 hours, topping $104,000 (highest since Jan 31). Nearly $400 million in bearish BTC short positions were liquidated in 24 hours (highest since Nov). The significant short squeeze suggests potential for further upside as bearish pressure eases
source: https://coinjournal.net/news/crypto-news-today-bitcoin-pushes-past-102k-as-record-etf-flows-trade-news-fuel-rally/

data.title: Bitcoin Holds Ground at $102K; XRP, ETH, SOL Push Higher After Trump-UK Trade Boost
data.description:
Bitcoin held above $100,000 on Friday after a US-UK trade deal sparked investor optimism and eased tariff concerns.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/bitcoin-price-steady-102k-altcoins-eth-xrp-sol-uk-trade-pact/

data.title: Whale James Wynn partially closed his 40x Bitcoin long position, with the remaining position worth $57 million
data.description: HyperInsight data shows that the whale James Wynn's 40x Bitcoin long order has been partially closed at $101,500 to $102,500, with a nominal value of about 330 Bitcoins, or about $33 million. The giant whale still holds a long order with a nominal value of 554 Bitcoins, worth about $57 million, and an unclosed profit of $4.73 million. Earlier news, the whale @JamesWynnReal opened a BTC long order worth $137 million on Hyperliquid using 40x leverage in the 40 hours since the afternoon of May 1. The number of long BTCs is 1,419.4, worth $137 million, with an average opening price of $96,629.4 and a liquidation price of $87,844.

data.title: CZ: I cannot hold BTC for a long time because I don’t understand enough about technology, finance and the world’s operation mechanism
data.description: CZ posted on X platform that users cannot hold Bitcoin for a long time, which is often due to insufficient understanding of technology, finance and the mechanism of the world. He said that if you buy Bitcoin only because others recommend it, you will be more likely to panic sell when it fluctuates. He suggested that investors read more relevant materials to enhance their cognition and belief.

data.title: A whale transferred 32.52 million NEIRO from CEX, becoming the third largest whale on the chain
data.description: Spotonchain monitoring shows that in the past hour, the whale "0x22b7" transferred 32.52 million NEIRO from CEX, equivalent to approximately US$3.01 million, accounting for 3.25% of the total supply, becoming the third largest whale holding coins on the chain.

data.title: Ethereum's Prospects Analyzed Amid Market Dynamics
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, LD Capital founder Jack Yi has expressed optimism about Ethereum at the $1,700 price point, citing several key factors. Yi highlights Ethereum's foundational role within the ecosystem and its Layer 1 development strategy as significant contributors to its potential growth.

He also notes the price adjustment from previous highs, suggesting that this correction presents a favorable opportunity for investment. Additionally, Yi points out the substantial volume of short positions currently in the market, which could lead to a potential price surge if these positions are unwound.

Furthermore, as one of the mainstream crypto assets, Ethereum's ETF products have a notable impact on the market, further supporting its positive outlook.

data.title: Loopscale releases post-hacker attack report: withdrawal function has been restarted
data.description: Loopscale released a post-hacker report, revealing that hackers exploited a pricing logic vulnerability in the protocol, resulting in the unauthorized outflow of 5,726,724.97 USDC and 1,211.4 SOL from the USDC and SOL Genesis vaults. Currently, all funds have been recovered and the withdrawal function has been restarted.

data.title: US man who sent crypto to ISIS could serve prison till he’s 65
data.description:
A man from the US state of Virginia will spend over three decades behind bars after being convicted of sending crypto to the terrorist organization commonly known as the Islamic State of Iraq and Syria. Federal Judge David Novak sentenced Mohammed Azharuddin Chhipa to 30 years and four months in prison on May 7 for sending over $185,000 to the Islamic State, the Department of Justice said on May 8. Prosecutors said that from around October 2019 until October 2022, the 35-year-old Chhipa collected and sent money to female Islamic State members in Syria, which helped them escape prison camps and funded fighting. The Justice Department said Chhipa would raise funds for the United Nations-designated terror organization through social media — receiving money online, or traveling hundreds of miles to accept donations in person
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/man-funded-isis-crypto-gets-over-30-years-prison?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Solana's Loopscale Recovers Funds After Security Breach
data.description:
According to Foresight News, Solana-based lending protocol Loopscale has released a report on a recent security incident. An attacker exploited a pricing logic flaw to borrow 5,726,700 USDC and 1,211.4 SOL. All funds have been successfully recovered through negotiations.

The incident was caused by a code path that inadequately verified the price of RateX PT tokens, which was deployed without a third-party audit. Loopscale has apologized for the breach and committed to enhancing security measures. These measures include mandatory third-party audits, launching a bug bounty program, increasing multi-signature authorization, and setting borrowing and withdrawal limits.

data.title: Gate.io CandyDrop launches SHM airdrop event, with the highest prize pool of 140112 SHM
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Gate.io CandyDrop is launching the SHM airdrop event from 11:00 on May 9 to 10:00 on May 26 (UTC+8). Users who participate in spot trading and contract trading can share the 140,112 SHM airdrop prize pool.
It is reported that the threshold of this CandyDrop SHM airdrop event is low. SHM spot trading volume reaches 50 USDT, and SHM contract trading volume reaches 500 USDT to share the prize pool. The event is fair and open, and both new and old users can participate. A single person can get up to 2,000 SHM airdrops.

data.title: CSGO Item Index Experiences Significant Decline
data.description: According to Odaily, the CSGO item index has experienced a notable decrease, dropping from its peak of 2514 on May 6 to the current level of 1980, marking a decline of approximately 20%. Several of the most traded items on Steam have seen their prices nearly halved.
